prompt:
A compact indoor hydroponic tub dedicated to basil, with several bright green basil plants growing from net pots in the lid and roots visible in the nutrient solution through a small window or translucent side panel. Soft LED grow lights shine from above, casting a gentle glow on the leaves, while a small bottle of nutrient concentrate and a measuring spoon sit next to the tub. The scene is focused on the tub itself, clearly showing a soil-free basil setup.

Near-future solarpunk kitchen or balcony corner with clean counters, a bit of natural light, and other small plants in the background. Photorealistic 512×512 style with no brand logos, no legible labels, and no people—just the equipment. The composition should clearly convey "growing basil hydroponically" in a practical, approachable way.
